title: Minimum Swaps To Make Sequences Increasing
titleCn: 使序列递增的最小交换次数

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,3,5,4], nums2 = [1,2,3,7] Output: 1 Explanation: Swap nums1[3] and nums2[3]. Then the sequences are: nums1 = [1, 3, 5, 7] and nums2 = [1, 2, 3, 4] which are both strictly increasing.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Swap nums1[3] and nums2[3]. Then the sequences are: nums1 = [1, 3, 5, 7] and nums2 = [1, 2, 3, 4] which are both strictly increasing.
